texto: Grandma calls it the Socratic Method. She considers it the highest pedagogical technique. I call it cornering a person. Instead of just telling you what I want you to know, I ambush you with questions. You try to escape, but you can’t. You can run whichever way you like, but in the end you’ll fall right into my trap.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sophia Nikolaidou: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Grandma calls it the Socratic Method. She considers it the highest pedagogical technique. I call …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, pedagogy, questions pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e questions.
